response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on coding skills across multiple languages (including Python, JavaScript, and D), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team instrumentation frameworks required for the Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems
Proven track record in building scalable, open-source infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong technical leadership through workshops, mentoring, and cross-team tooling contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into AI/ML integration for engineering velocity or experimental analysis
Experience with enterprise-scale, multi-region systems is implied but not explicitly documented
